rulings.Case Title: IN RE THE MATTER OF THE GLENN AND ELSA LERNER TRUST
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Glenn Lerner's Motion for Summary Adjudication is denied. Triable issues of fact exist regarding the revocability of the Survivor's Trust, the effect of the Agreement Regarding Surviving Settlor's Rights and Duties and the subsequent amendment, the revocability of the Marital Trust and the Family Trust, the limitations imposed on the Trustee in those trusts. Any party who wishes to contest the tentative ruling must advise opposing counsel and the Court (415) 551-3702 before 5:00 p.m. on July 6, 2011.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Petitioner For Order Compelling Discovery; Memorandum In Support
rulings.Rulings: Request for Production of Documents #s 6, 9 & 11 attached to deposition notice of Nick Despotopoulos Request # 6 ¿ Grant. All documentation showing dates of sale, description of the works, amounts paid and Groovy¿s share of sales proceeds must be produced. However, the identities and addresses of any buyers must be redacted to protect their privacy. Request #9 ¿ Grant as to the time period March 23, 2010 to present. Identities and addresses of the purchasers must be redacted to protect their privacy. Request #11 ¿ Deny. Deposition questions re: sale of prints and development of website. A. Deposition questions regarding sales of prints using estate¿s email contact list ¿ Grant B. Deposition questions regarding development of comparable websites ¿ Grant As to the matters granted, Despotopoulos must produce the requested documents within 10 days and to appear for deposition within 20 days to respond to further questions related to the documents or deposition questions. If any party wishes to contest the tentative ruling, they must contact the probate courtroom clerk at 415/551-3702 and opposing counsel no later than 4:00pm on July 6, 2011.
